briefdescription.para: Input data should be word aligned.
This function sends string to SHA module for hashing.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the SHA driver.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - hash successfully generated for given input data string.
XST_FAILURE - if the hash generation failed.//! [SHA example]

briefdescription.para: This function compares the given hash with the expected Hash.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - if the expected hash is equal to the given hash

briefdescription.para: This function prints the given hash on the console.
Main function to call the SecureShaExample.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the SHA calculation is successful.
XST_FAILURE if the SHA calculation failed.
XST_FAILURE if the SHA calculation failed.
